title: Notification No.11/2013-Cus(NT),dt. 24.1.2013
text: [To be published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii) of dated this 24th January, 2013] Government of India Ministry of Finance (Department of Revenue) Notification No. 11 /2013-Customs (N.T.) New Delhi, the 24th January, 2013. S.O. (E). - In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 5 of the Customs Act, 1962 (52 of 1962), the Central Board of Excise and Customs hereby imposes on the Additional Commissioner of Customs, Inland Container Depot, Tughlakabad, New Delhi, to act as the adjudicating authority, to exercise the powers and discharge the duties conferred or imposed on - (i) the Additional Commissioner of Customs, ICD, Tughlakabad, New Delhi; and (ii) the Additional Commissioner of Customs, CFS, Patparganj, New Delhi, for the purpose of adjudicating the matters relating to Show Cause Notice pertaining to M/s Sanam Exports, 25/75, Gali No.15 Vishwasnagar, New Delhi., issued vide, F. No.23/42/2009-DZU(Sanam)/3512 to 3518, dated the 31st July, 2012, by the Assistant Director, Directorate of Revenue Intelligence, Zonal Unit, Delhi. . [F. No. 437/51/2012-Cus.IV] M.V.Vasudevan Under Secretary to the Government of India -- 1 of 1 --
